title: REINDEX causes "UNIQUE constraint failed" error when using TRIGGER
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE, amount FLOAT CHECK(amount >= 0));
CREATE TRIGGER tr1 AFTER INSERT ON t1 FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO t1(value) VALUES (NEW.value);
key_bug_features: REINDEX operation with recursive triggers causes UNIQUE constraint failure
